references.name: Ben Morris — Josef Muller Brockmann Grid-Based Layout
observedPatterns: Rigid 8-column modular grid with mathematically consistent gutters
Rule-based visual hierarchy using horizontal lines for separation
Monochromatic palette with selective color used only for emphasis
Dense information organization within grid cells
adaptedElements: 8-column stats grid with 1px gap borders (timetable aesthetic)
Horizontal rule under all section headers and card headers
Black/white/gray palette with #D72638 red restricted to active states and critical indicators only

references.name: Navbar Gallery — Best Sidebar Navigation Menu Design Examples
observedPatterns: Icon + label pairing for compact sidebar items
Active state indicated by left border accent stripe
adaptedElements: 220px black sidebar with red left-border accent for active items
18px SVG icons paired with compact 13px labels
User avatar in sidebar footer with initials display

references.name: Swiss Themes — Swiss Design Principles for Web Designers
observedPatterns: Typography as primary visual element, not decoration
Grid as constraint rather than suggestion
Clear size hierarchy between heading, subheading, body, and caption
adaptedElements: Inter (800) for headings with -0.02em tracking, uppercase transforms for section labels
JetBrains Mono for all technical/data content (timestamps, IDs, metrics)
